case_title: STORNIOLO BENITO C/O BENVENUTI RESTAURANT et al VS HANSON LUISA C/O LOUISA'S ITALIAN RESTAURANT et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY STORNIOLO BENITO C/O BENVENUTI RESTAURANT CARDARELLI ANGELO C/O BENVENUTI RESTAURANT AS TO DEFENDANT HANSON LUISA C/O LOUISA'S ITALIAN RESTAURANT VIETTI JIM BROKER C/O VANGUARD PROPERTIES VANGUARD PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HANSON LUISA C/O LOUISA'S ITALIAN RESTAURANT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STORNIOLO BENITO C/O BENVENUTI RESTAURANT CARDARELLI ANGELO C/O BENVENUTI RESTAURANT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIETTI JIM BROKER C/O VANGUARD PROPERTIES $1,850.00 PRINCIPAL, $93.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,943.00, PLAINTIFF TO TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFT. HANSON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
